title: Adington's Awesome Additions
description: A colorful, cartoony overhaul of Minecraft! reimagined monsters, villagers, farm animals, and more!
body:
### Feel like Minecraft's lost its vibe? bring it back with Adington's Awesome Additions!

A cartoony overhaul of minecraft made to give off the vibe of walking throughout a beautifully lived in Minecraft world or a newly made fresh landscape ready for building.![A minecraft base featuring a giant lake in the middle with a cherry tree in it, a ship and bridge on each side, and a massive manor behind it all.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/aa10a60c6c8f043490123cde1bf3a582ce283d89.jpeg)


### !!! REQUIRES EMF AND ETF !!!
support for appleskin too :)
